Welcome

Legacy Landscaping

Legacy Landscaping has been serving Portland and the surrounding region with premium landscaping services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Portland Trusts Legacy Landscaping

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →

What We Do

Our Services

Rain Garden Installation

Rain gardens are essential for Portland properties dealing with our 40+ inches of annual rainfall. We design shallow dep...

Drought-Tolerant Landscaping

While Portland is known for rain, our summers have become progressively drier. Our drought-tolerant landscapes use plant...

Moss Management

Moss is both a blessing and curse in Portland's damp climate. While it adds charm to some areas, it can make walkways da...

Native Plant Gardens

Native plant gardens offer beauty, biodiversity, and effortless maintenance - perfect for Portland homeowners who want t...

Patio & Hardscaping

Our Difference

The Benefits of Choosing Legacy Landscaping

    Quality Craftsmanship

    Every project completed to the highest standards of excellence

Contact Us →
“
After years of basement flooding in our 1920s Portland bungalow, Legacy installed a rain garden that solved our water issues while creating a stunning native plant display. They understood exactly how to grade our sloped lot to direct water properly. The Oregon iris they planted has spread beautifully and attracts hummingbirds daily.
— Sarah K.

Tailored solutions for unique requirements
